title: Correct Odisha Subsidy Structure Values

requirements.text: Update the Odisha subsidy structure displayed in the OdishaGuide component to reflect the correct values: 1 kW = Central ₹30,000 + State ₹25,000 = Total ₹55,000; 2 kW = Central ₹60,000 + State ₹50,000 = Total ₹1,10,000; 3 kW+ = Central ₹78,000 + State ₹60,000 = Total ₹1,38,000 (Maximum cap). Ensure all three language variants (English, Hindi, Odia) in the translations file are updated consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: OdishaGuide subsidy tier card for 1 kW shows Central ₹30,000 + State ₹25,000 = ₹55,000 total
OdishaGuide subsidy tier card for 2 kW shows Central ₹60,000 + State ₹50,000 = ₹1,10,000 total
OdishaGuide subsidy tier card for 3 kW+ shows Central ₹78,000 + State ₹60,000 = ₹1,38,000 total with 'Maximum cap' label
All subsidy values are consistent across English, Hindi, and Odia translations in translations.ts
No other subsidy figures or layout changes are made

constraints: Do not change any other subsidy-related content outside the three specified tiers
Do not alter the visual layout, card styling, or animations of OdishaGuide
Do not modify any backend logic or data models
nonGoals: Adding new subsidy tiers or categories
Changing the design or theme of the OdishaGuide section
Updating any other state's subsidy information
